name: bunny-plugin
description: Bunny developer tools for OpenAI Codex — search Bunny docs, generate and validate GraphQL, and integrate Bunny subscriptions and billing into your app

interface.shortDescription: Search Bunny docs, validate GraphQL, and integrate subscriptions and billing faster.
interface.longDescription: Search live Bunny documentation, generate and validate GraphQL queries against Bunny's API, and get guided integrations for the Node and Ruby SDKs, the @bunnyapp/components React library, webhooks, the customer portal, and the subscription/quote/invoice lifecycle — all without leaving your workflow.
defaultPrompt: Create a Bunny subscription for a customer using the Node SDK
Handle a Bunny webhook event in Express
Add a Bunny checkout page to my Next.js app using @bunnyapp/components
Validate my GraphQL mutation against the Bunny schema
